resolution.minLength: Add a solution summary (at least {{min}} characters).
resolution.required: A solution summary is required to mark as resolved (minimum {{min}} characters).
resolution.declined: Customer declined the solution — ticket reopened.

closeRequest.useCloseFlow: Use Close request to close with a reason (invalid, duplicate, or no response).

attachments.slotFull: You can attach at most {{max}} files on this ticket.
attachments.extraNotAdded: You can attach at most {{max}} files on this ticket. Extra files were not added.
